scope.summary: CF3 removes the doctor atomic-install rename race: apply_legacy_state_migration walks to the destination through verified no-follow directory handles, creates 0600 create-new files, checks identity at commit, and installs the migrated audit state with an atomic hard link that refuses to replace an existing destination. Re-derived at 009dc02f, the tree this evidence was produced from.
out_of_scope: The migration's layout policy and legacy/current conflict handling are unchanged.
No general filesystem sandbox or unrelated doctor repair behavior is claimed.

entry_points.name: apply_legacy_state_migration
entry_points.trace: Provenance, derived from git rather than asserted: ee1b23adc5300c22e8fcba26c16fe09a14a06d2d ('fix(doctor): harden atomic audit migration') is the commit whose diff introduced both the capability-handle migration and its negative regression test, and f3650548bdfd7c970ec4d4c17797984b6d963796 ('fix(doctor): unbreak the hardened audit migration') repaired a path-traversal/EBADF regression inside it. Both are ancestors of 009dc02f. doctor.rs is byte-identical from bceab7599b6a87437300a1fc6d63416d835b5c53 (the last commit to touch it) through 009dc02f, so the behavior proved below is the behavior this close binds.

entry_points.name: legacy_migration_refuses_symlink_swaps_at_atomic_install
entry_points.trace: Executed, not cited: in a dedicated clean worktree checked out at 009dc02f (constitution rule 14), CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/var/tmp/omcp-cf3-close-target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --lib legacy_migration reported 'test doctor::tests::legacy_migration_refuses_symlink_swaps_at_atomic_install ... ok; 1 passed; 0 failed'. The test deterministically replaces the destination parent and then the final destination with attacker-controlled symlinks; each swap is refused without writing through the replacement, and the legacy source is left untouched.

limitations: This close correction makes no live-service claim; the filesystem race regression it proves is deterministic and Unix-only, matching the behavior it asserts.

The prior document bound f3650548, which landed AFTER the original closing commit bc1bfa1d651cd7807b2f67c7b717f52ba1ab55c9 and is not its ancestor; that is what produced CLOSE_REASON_SOURCE_MISMATCH, SOURCE_NOT_ANCESTOR, CLOSE_EVIDENCE_CHANGED_AFTER_CLOSE and SCOPE_CHANGED_AFTER_SOURCE. This document is re-derived at 009dc02f instead of re-pointed at a convenient commit.

source.tree_clean is scope-relative and was established in a clean worktree at 009dc02f. The shared checkout's own copy of doctor.rs carries another agent's uncommitted OracleConnection::close() test-fake additions, which are unrelated to CF3 and are not claimed here.
